search_query: when does longmire season four hit netflix
combined_text: Longmire: Netflix Sets Season 4 Release Date, Solves Time Jump Mystery Longmire: Netflix Sets Season 4 Release Date, Solves Time Jump Mystery By Michael Ausiello / July 28 2015, 8:40 AM PDT99Longmire fans, it’s the Season 4 update you’ve been (impatiently) waiting for. Netflix announced on Tuesday that the ex-A&E drama’s 10-episode fourth season will drop on Thursday,
